description: Fully compliant policy — all 20 rules pass

input.policy_text:
## Privacy Policy
This is a dedicated privacy policy section covering all personal data and data subject rights.

## Data Retention
We have a strict retention period of 7 years to retain data for business needs.

## Access Control
We enforce strict access control using role-based access to ensure proper authorization.

## GDPR Compliance
We strictly comply with the direct General Data Protection regulation and standard GDPR rules.

## Incident Response
Our incident response plan outlines immediate breach notification procedures.

## Audit Logging
Every action generates an audit log to maintain a complete audit trail.

## Employee Training
All staff must undergo regular compliance training and security awareness education.

## Encryption
All sensitive information requires TLS encryption and robust cryptography.

## Consent Mechanism
Users must explicitly opt-in via a consent form, forming a binding user agreement.

## Policy Review
An annual review and policy update cycle ensures everything remains current.

## Vendor Management
A comprehensive third-party vendor assessment limits supplier risks.

## Breach Notification
We adhere to a mandatory 72 hours notification timeline.

## Right to Erasure
Users can submit a deletion request to exercise their right to be forgotten.

## Data Minimization
Only strictly necessary and minimal data is collected from users.

## Password Policy
Our password policy enforces significant length and complexity.

## MFA Requirement
We mandate a multi-factor authentication (MFA) requirement for all users.

## Vulnerability Management
Weekly vulnerability scans and penetration testing are part of our process.

## Business Continuity
Our business continuity plan (BCP) includes comprehensive disaster recovery protocols.

## Data Classification
We enforce a structured data classification system dividing public and restricted data.

## Whistleblower Policy
We maintain a secure whistleblower hotline for anonymous reporting of misconduct.
